tagline: A low-overhead home-based painting franchise backed by Neighborly where owners manage subcontractors and never pick up a brush.
description_short: Five Star Painting is an established painting services franchise where owners manage subcontractors and focus on sales and marketing rather than the physical work. Backed by Neighborly the world's largest home services company it offers a home-based entry from $82K with protected territories and 19 years of proven franchising infrastructure. A strong fit for executives looking to scale a service business in an $80B market with consistent consumer demand.
market_intelligence_insight: The house painting services market was valued at approximately $79.9 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach $124.6 billion by 2033 at a CAGR of 5.5% driven by home renovation demand HOA repaint requirements and aging housing stock across North America.
item_19_headline: 2025 average gross sales per job of $4440 across 208 reporting businesses combining Five Star Painting and ProTect Painters?
ongoing_support: franchise business coach,field support visits,annual Reunion convention,regional training events,ProTradeNet vendor network,local marketing specialists,national marketing fund,call center program
